pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh EXPECTED_SCREENSHOT variable and setup_task.sh cleanup commands
Confirmed by checking OpenBCI GUI GitHub repository source files (W_TimeSeries.pde, W_FFT.pde, W_BandPower.pde, W_EMG.pde) and verifier.py verification logic
OpenBCI official documentation and OpenBCI GUI source code support for Ganglion board type
OpenBCI official website specifications confirm the Ganglion board is a 4-channel device

privileged_info_summary: The OpenBCI Ganglion board is verified to be a 4-channel bioamplifier. The requested widgets (Time Series, FFT Plot, Band Power, EMG) are all valid, standard components in the OpenBCI GUI software. The screenshot path is verified directly from the task's export script (/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/ganglion_dashboard.png). The data environment is synthetic as the OpenBCI GUI is set to Synthetic mode, which generates 4 channels of mock data for testing.
